run_git_phrase_search: run a case-insensitive phrase search across git commit history in a repository
replay_git_actions_from_json: replay a predefined set of git log and show actions loaded from a JSON file
build_phrase_actions: build git log actions with case-insensitive grep for a list of search phrases
execute_git_commit_action: execute a single git log or show action against a repository and return results
load_search_plan: load and validate a git search plan from a JSON file with log and show actions
